posts.title: M.J.E.R.D Enterprise Launches Wefunder Regulation CF Campaign
posts.excerpt: M.J.E.R.D Enterprise, Inc. officially launches its community investment round on Wefunder, targeting $50,000 to $124,000 under Regulation CF.
posts.body: M.J.E.R.D Enterprise, Inc. officially launches its community investment round on Wefunder, targeting between $50,000 and $124,000 under Regulation CF. The raise is structured as a Revenue Share Loan offering investors 3% of gross revenue until they receive a 2.2X return (early bird) or 1.9X return (standard). Minimum investment is $100.

posts.title: M.J.E.R.D Enterprise Completes Delaware C-Corporation Conversion
posts.excerpt: M.J.E.R.D Enterprise, Inc. successfully converts to a Delaware C-Corporation, establishing the institutional legal foundation for its acquisition strategy.
posts.body: M.J.E.R.D Enterprise, Inc. successfully converts to a Delaware C-Corporation (EIN: 41-3584270). The company foreign-qualifies in Florida and operates from its Boynton Beach headquarters under a governance structure built for long-term, disciplined acquisition activity.

posts.title: First Acquisition Target Identified
posts.excerpt: M.J.E.R.D Enterprise identifies a fundamentally sound business as its primary acquisition target, with $61,379.77 in documented gross revenue from January through October 2025.
posts.body: M.J.E.R.D Enterprise identifies its primary first acquisition target, a fitness industry business generating $61,379.77 in documented gross revenue from January through October 2025. Capital raised through the Wefunder campaign will be deployed toward closing this acquisition under our disciplined capital allocation philosophy.

posts.title: M.J.E.R.D Enterprise Founded
posts.excerpt: Martin J. Dacelin founds M.J.E.R.D Enterprise with a vision to build a disciplined holding company grounded in long-term ownership and generational wealth.
posts.body: Martin J. Dacelin founds M.J.E.R.D Enterprise with a singular vision: to build a disciplined holding company that acquires fundamentally sound businesses and holds them for the long term, guided by six core investment principles and a generational wealth mission.
